name: Nova Six
explanation: A 6-voice DCO polysynth in the Juno-106 lineage. A single stable DCO (saw + variable pulse with PWM) plus a square sub feeds a resonant low-pass with its own decay envelope, then a non-resonant high-pass that carves the low end (its signature move), into a lush BBD-style chorus. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, HPF (high-pass), Env Amount, Chorus and Level.
